chunks.text: Verified Income Tax Act Sections: 10 (exemptions), 10A/10B (export units), 16 (standard deduction), 24(b) (home loan interest), 44AD/44ADA (presumptive income), 54/54F (capital gains exemption property), 54EC (NHAI/REC bonds), 56(2) (angel tax), 80C to 80U (deductions chapter), 80CCD (NPS), 80D (health insurance), 80E (education loan), 80G (donations), 80TTA/80TTB (savings interest), 87A (rebate), 111A (STCG equity 15%), 112A (LTCG equity 10%), 139 (ITR filing), 143 (assessment), 194A/194I/194J/194IA (TDS), 271 (penalty false statement), 276C (prosecution tax evasion), 278A/278B/278C/278E (punishment abetment).

Verified GST Act Sections: Section 9 (levy of GST), Section 10 (composition scheme), Section 15 (value of taxable supply), Section 16 (input tax credit eligibility), Section 17 (blocked credits), Section 22 (registration threshold ₹40L), Section 37/38/39 (GSTR returns), Section 44 (annual return), Section 74 (tax fraud penalty up to 100% of tax). GST returns: GSTR-1 (outward supplies), GSTR-3B (monthly summary), GSTR-9 (annual).

Verified Companies Act 2013 Sections relevant to personal finance/startups: Section 56 (transfer of securities), Section 62 (rights issue), Section 135 (CSR — 2% net profit for companies ≥ ₹500Cr revenue). For startups: Section 42 (private placement), Section 54 (sweat equity), Section 68 (buyback). DPIIT recognition required for Startup India benefits. MCA21 portal for company registration (₹0 for OPC/private company).
